remarks: What if you had waited long enough to find your perfect house, and then it appeared? Crafted as the builder's own residence, every decision was made to create a home of EXTRAORDINARY QUALITY, design and lasting value. The Kitchen features 2" marble countertop on the 8' island, quartz countertops, 48" range, wine refrigerator, abundant natural light, butler's pantry/wet bar, plus a 2nd pantry. Open to the Family room with fireplace connecting to a fabulous covered porch with fireplace. And then...there are THE VIEWS! Rolling lawns on the 1.6 acre property lead to the pond waterfront for the most peaceful setting in all seasons. A mudroom with shiplap, 2nd powder room, and ample closet space keeps mess contained. Two private offices-one on the main level and one on the third floor-offer dual workspaces. The second floor includes a primary suite with two WIC's, three additional bedrooms with ensuite or jack-and-jill bath and a huge bonus/playroom. The newly finished third floor serves as a private retreat with a large sun-filled gym, 5th bedroom, full bath, and large private office for concentration above the fray. The huge 3-car garage is enhanced by a 2nd-level EV charger. Whole-house generator. This one is different--so solid and elegant, in a beautiful quiet neighborhood, and set on land that one just cannot find anymore. Don't wait!
